case_title: ROBERTO LOBO FILHO VS. COMMINITY AWARENESSES TREATMENT SERVICES INC

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILHO, ROBERTO LOBO AS TO DEFENDANT COMMINITY AWARENESSES TREATMENT SERVICES INC SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-08-2006 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-08-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-27-2006
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FILHO, ROBERTO LOBO ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR NOV-07-2006 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-07-2006 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS OF $200.00 AGAINST ROBERTO LOBO FILHO, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: NOV-07-2006 PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE NOV-22-2006. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: DAVE DAVENPORT, CSR#1694. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-22-2007 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE DEC-08-2006 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR JAN-22-2007 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST ROBERTO LOBO FILHO, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JAN-22-2007, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-06-2007. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: PATRICIA DOWLING, CSR#5388. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-22-2007 CONTINUED TO APR-23-2007 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-23-2007 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING APR-23-2007 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: RITA ARLENE HOWELL, CSR#2542. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, it is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Rita Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2007 Continued To Apr-23-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 4/23/2007 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Patricia Dowling, CSR#5388. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-30-2006 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jan-22-07 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2006 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Dave Davenport, CSR#1694. (212)
